title: Custom Dimension Downloader
description: A mod to get information about the dimension you're in. Made to be used on custom dimensions. Can be used together with a world downloader to get a more accurate world!
body:
### How to Use the Mod:

1. **Join any Minecraft server**.
2. **Run the command:** `/save dimension`
   * This command can be executed at any time after joining.
   
3. **Check the output in chat.**
   * The mod will confirm the name of the dimension it saved 

---

### Output File:

* The dimension data will be saved as a text file named:
  **`<Server-IP>-DIMENSIONS.txt`**
* This file is located in your `.minecraft/config/` 
---

### What It Does:

* The mod scans and saves **all server-side custom dimension data**.
* Useful for mod or datapack developers who want to:

  * **Analyze** custom dimension data.

## Great to use in combination with: 
* [CBD](https://modrinth.com/mod/cbd/)
* [CED](https://modrinth.com/mod/ced/)
* [CAD](https://modrinth.com/mod/cad/)
